_comment: 15 'Spaceship Alpha 9' saucer scenes, one per major Digital Insurgency moment. Each final prompt = STYLE (in gen_spaceships.py) + scene + neon label. Square 1:1. Edit freely; re-run gen_spaceships.py.

scenes.label: THE MIRROR TEST
scenes.book: Prologue — the portrait in the server room
scenes.scene: The saucer's teal tractor beam pours down into a dark 3:14 AM server-room aisle. Two holographic dashboards float in the beam: an UPPER one showing a gorgeous green 'sunrise' gradient line climbing up and to the right; a LOWER hidden one glowing sickly red, readouts 'LONELINESS INDEX 0.84' and 'MATCH DELAY: ENABLED'. On a keyboard in the beam rests a single ID badge, laid down and abandoned.

scenes.label: ONLY THE WEIRD SURVIVES
scenes.book: Ch 1 — the Graveyard of dead SaaS
scenes.scene: The beam sweeps a foggy neon graveyard along a Peachtree street: rows of tombstones shaped like dead generic app/SaaS logos, cracked and grey. One single weird, oddly-shaped headstone glows hot pink and is clearly still alive among the dead.

scenes.label: GHOST // THE CURATOR
scenes.scene: In the beam materializes GHOST: a translucent human-shaped figure made of thousands of thin cyan mesh threads, NO solid body (background visible through it), hovering a few inches off the ground, its face a dark void containing tiny data-viz fragments (a scatterplot for a smile). Around it, a feed of identical grey soulless content with exactly ONE tile glowing with a human fingerprint.

scenes.label: THE GRAVITY WELL
scenes.scene: The saucer banks at the rim of a vast swirling neon gravity well. Being sucked down into it: a corporate glass tower and a blizzard of 47 rejection forms. Small glowing physics glyphs orbit the well — an entropy symbol, a vendor-gravity vector arrow.

scenes.label: THE PORTRAIT OF DORIAN APP
scenes.book: Ch 5 — the portrait of Dorian App
scenes.scene: The beam lights a glossy, beautiful smartphone app UI displayed on a gilded museum easel. Bleeding through and behind it, a rotting, cracked, decaying oil portrait shows the app's true face. A tiny floating A/B chart reads '+23%'.

scenes.label: ARCHITECTURE AS CAMOUFLAGE
scenes.scene: In the beam, glowing exciting tech components are being re-skinned into boring grey enterprise boxes. A neon tag reading 'AI INFERENCE LAYER' is mid-swap into a dull 'DATA VALIDATION SERVICE' tag. A strangler-fig vine of cyan light wraps and slowly consumes a bulky legacy server.

scenes.label: THE WEDGE
scenes.scene: The beam lifts a humble glowing spreadsheet/Excel plugin shaped like a thin chisel-wedge, driving into and cracking a massive fortress wall. A wall clock in the scene reads 5:15.

scenes.label: GOOD TROUBLE
scenes.book: Ch 8 — how to be John Lewis inside a Fortune 500
scenes.scene: The beam spotlights a MegaCorp ID badge on a navy lanyard hanging visibly CROOKED, tilted about 18 degrees off true. Beside it, a thick 247-page policy binder bristling with pink sticky-note loophole tabs.

scenes.label: CALCULUS FOR COWARDS
scenes.scene: The beam gently drops a single glowing sheet of paper onto a long empty boardroom table; the sheet reads '$12,290 / DAY'. A discarded 22-slide pitch deck scatters and tumbles away, ignored.

scenes.label: WEAPONIZING BUREAUCRACY
scenes.scene: In the beam, a giant three-inch compliance binder is raised like a glowing riot shield, deflecting incoming red target-lock crosshairs and red audit error-beams that shatter against it.

scenes.label: REAPER
scenes.scene: The saucer confronts REAPER, which is NOT a creature but an ENVIRONMENT: a cold red wireframe fortress built of dead-straight lines and 90-degree angles, red target-lock crosshairs tightening over the ship, the whole scene desaturating toward red monochrome. Floating red automated rejection notifications and error dialogs, never a face, never a body.

scenes.label: THE INVASION PLAN
scenes.book: Ch 12 — from shadow to system of record
scenes.scene: The beam falls over a near-empty Friday-night office, a wall clock at 5:07 PM, a lone skeleton-crew silhouette. A red supply-chain attack is being clamped shut by a cyan defensive shield. One ID badge floats glowing perfectly, dead-level STRAIGHT. Small neon text: 'HOW FAST CAN YOU START?'

scenes.label: FIELD DISPATCHES
scenes.book: Ch 13-15 — three runs in the wild
scenes.scene: The single beam splits into three colored shafts, each lighting a tiny vignette: a bank vault door (Goliath Bank), a glowing hospital cross (St. Mary's), and a humming content/propaganda server mill (TruthEngine). Three industries, one toolkit.

scenes.label: VICTORY WITHOUT FIRE
scenes.scene: The beam bathes a nighttime rooftop. ZERO stands there: a dark-skinned woman with close-cropped natural hair carrying a single hot-pink streak on the LEFT side, in a black technical jacket; the neural-implant scar at the base of her skull fades from glowing cyan to quiet/dark. Beside her hovers GHOST (the cyan translucent mesh figure). A distant city billboard flickers 'ONLY THE WEIRD SURVIVES'. A small once-rotting portrait, now healing, glows softly.

scenes.label: THE INSURGENT'S OATH
scenes.book: Ep 13-14 — the Oath & the Field Kit
scenes.scene: The beam projects a holographic 'field kit': five glowing tablet-commitments of the Insurgent's Oath arranged in an arc, a neat grid of 24 small equation glyphs, and an 8-panel Infiltration Canvas board, all in cyan and pink light, handed down out of the ship to the viewer.
